# Second Brain Starter Template

> A persistent, interlinked markdown knowledge base that you and your AI agent build together.

## What Is This?

An Obsidian vault + GitHub repo template. Clone it, open in Obsidian, connect your AI agent, and start building a living knowledge base — an LLM Wiki.

## Architecture

Four zones:

| Zone | Path | Purpose |
|------|------|---------|
| Sources | `/sources/` | Raw materials — articles, papers, transcripts. Immutable. |
| Wiki | `/wiki/` | Synthesized knowledge — the agent writes, you review. |
| Journal | `/journal/` | Your thinking — daily notes, reflections. |
| Schema | `/schema/` | Rules — tags, templates, agent protocol. |

## Quick Start

1. Clone this repo
2. Open the folder in Obsidian
3. Point your AI agent at the vault
4. Drop sources into `/sources/`, run `/ingest`, review wiki pages

## Agent Instructions

- `CLAUDE.md` — Claude Code
- `AGENTS.md` — Any agent
- `.cursorrules` — Cursor
- `copilot-instructions.md` — GitHub Copilot

All point to `/schema/agent-protocol.md` as the single source of truth.

## Slash Commands (Claude Code)

`/ingest` `/ask` `/research` `/daily` `/sync` `/status` `/expand`

## Links

- Full docs: `/README.md`
- Agent protocol: `/schema/agent-protocol.md`
- Tag taxonomy: `/schema/tags.md`
